theme.style: Velvety espresso-dark world built from deep roasted browns, smoldering amber, and near-black shadows. Cinematic warmth radiates from within like candlelight trapped in glass — moody, intimate, and premium. Textures feel like brushed leather, polished obsidian, and translucent smoked resin. Every slide carries the sense of a private listening room where the music is everything.

slides.label: Authentication
